## Summary

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Testing

How was this tested?

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style conventions
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python -m pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Commits include DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] SPDX license header on new files
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
